content.en:
In the blink of an eye, half a year has passed.

The notice of the Supreme Hall of the Terran was issued, and all the highnesses of the Supreme Hall of the entire Terran immediately gathered.

They are about to set off for the ruins of the last cosmic era and participate in the prosperity of the entire universe.

Yellow area.

Ye Tian came out of the cultivation tower, and the other highnesses also gathered one by one to Bibo Lake, which was the gathering place of the yellow-level area.

Soon, all the highnesses arrived.

Ye Tian counted slightly, there were a total of 598 Highnesses, which were also all the emperor-level cosmic sons accumulated by the Supreme Hall of the Human Race during this hundred years.

It didn't take long for the six town hall envoys to arrive!

"Come with us!"

The Divine Lord commanded.

"Yes!"

His Highnesses answered.

In an instant, many highnesses left the yellow-level area under the leadership of the six town hall envoys and came to the outside of the supreme hall of the human race.

Subsequently.

His Highnesses all left the Origin Realm and entered the Tianlan Giant City in the Terran Sanctuary.

Soon, Ye Tian and the other Terran highnesses met in a huge temple space.

Here, Ye Tian saw many god-level highnesses, true god-level highnesses, and great god-level highnesses, among which the number of great god-level highnesses was the smallest, only eighteen.

I don't know if there were only eighteen of them, or if other great god-level highnesses forcibly attacked the galaxy level and were unwilling to participate in this grand era.

And among these eighteen Great God-level Highnesses, one of them is His Highness Qin Chen.

His Royal Highness Qin Chen also noticed Ye Tian, and nodded slightly at Ye Tian, even if it was a greeting, Ye Tian also nodded in response.

I waited about half an hour.

Figures descended here.

Among these figures, Ye Tian saw the Xuanyuan Domination.

Obviously, these people are all dominant-level powerhouses.

At the same time, an illusory shadow appeared, and even those masters bent slightly.

However, this shadow was shrouded in layers of fog, and it was difficult to see clearly.

"Is this man one of the seventy-eight top Terran beings?"

Ye Tian guessed.

As for whether it is the supreme or not, he can't be sure, after all, there are very few supremes of the human race.

However, the possibility of the appearance of the Supreme is also very high, because this prosperity is very important, and it is even related to the strength and rise and fall of a race.

"Let's go!"

The mysterious powerhouse who was suspected of being the supreme said lightly.

Then, Ye Tian found himself being moved to the sons of the hall on a spaceship, and the other highnesses were also moved in.

Soon.

A voice came.

"The nine-star spaceship of our human race here can only fly to the center of the universe in a few months at the speed of a nine-star spaceship, otherwise even a dominant-level powerhouse will not be able to fly to the center of the universe in a few months. "

The one who spoke was a master.

The Lord stood in front of all His Highnesses and explained to many of them.

And at this time, Ye Tian's copying talent enveloped this master, as well as the other masters.

After all, this spaceship does not suppress Ye Tian's copying talent much, and his copying talent can easily envelop the entire spaceship, so he can naturally check the talent situation of these masters.

"Chaos level cultivation talent!"

"Chaos level cultivation talent!"

"Chaos level cultivation talent!"

......

There are a total of eight masters, and the cultivation talents of these eight masters are all chaos-level cultivation talents, and there is no one who surpasses the chaos-level cultivation talents.

As for the mysterious existence that surpassed the master, Ye Tian's copying talent did not envelop the other party.

There are only two cases –

The first is that the mysterious powerhouse is not on this spaceship, but the other party can shield the induction of the copy talent, and the copy talent cannot see the opponent.

"It should be shielded, after all, in such a prosperous world, it is unlikely that the Supremes will not appear, and even more than one Supreme will go to protect it. "

Ye Tian guessed.

Although he couldn't replicate the cultivation talents that surpassed the Chaos level, Ye Tian had already copied several Chaos level cultivation talents just now, as long as he fused these Chaos level cultivation talents into his own cultivation talents, his cultivation talents could transform beyond the Chaos level.

"This spaceship is huge, you each find a cabin to live in!"

One of the juggernauts said.

Immediately.

One by one, these juggernauts disappeared.

Then, the other Highnesses also searched for empty cabins one by one, and there were fewer and fewer Highnesses standing in the hall.

Ye Tian also left the hall, found a small cabin, closed the door, and moved in.

Immediately.

Ye Tian rearranged a concealment formation and a soundproof formation, although it was not very useful, but if it was arranged, his heart would be a little more stable.

Then, he began to fuse the Chaos level cultivation talent that he had just copied into his hands.

"Fusion!"

Ye Tian said in his heart.

Rumble!!!!

The fusion begins!

After experiencing severe pain for half an hour, Ye Tian finally completed the fusion transformation.

With a thought, Ye Tian checked his talent.

At this time, his cultivation talent had finally transformed again.

【Cultivation Talent: Mixed Level】

"Sure enough, Chaos! Chaos! My cultivation talent was chaos level before, but now it has become a mixed level cultivation talent, I don't know if this mixed level cultivation talent is the limit?" Ye Tian said darkly.

The mixed-level cultivation talent represented that Ye Tian was able to cultivate to a level above the Domination Realm, and was at the same level as the seventy-eight top beings of the human race.

And the Shentai Divine Lord also said that the seventy-eight top beings of the human race were actually in the same realm, and although the Supreme was more powerful, it was still at the same level.

It's like Ye Tiannai is the son of the Eternal Ancient Universe, and those ordinary Emperor Rank are all at the Emperor level, but he can instantly kill millions of ordinary Emperor Level.

"The strongest of the human race is the Supreme, those Supremes should also be mixed-level cultivation talents, I can have mixed-level cultivation talents, what else is there not to be satisfied with?"

Thinking like this, Ye Tian didn't care if there were any higher-level cultivation talents on top of the mixed-level cultivation talents.

Time passes slowly.

Ye Tian quietly cultivated the Chaos Refining Technique on the spaceship, although it was not very useful, but it could not waste time, and it was good to be able to increase a little strength.

And just like that, four months passed.

this day.

The voices of the juggernauts came.

"It's time to get there, everyone is out!"

Boom!!

The hatch of the spaceship opened, and His Highness descended from the spaceship.

When he walked out of the spaceship, Ye Tian's eyes were completely stunned by the scene in front of him.

Far away was a huge black hole, devouring the light around it, this black hole was too big and too big, beyond Ye Tian's imagination.

The laws here are even chaotic, as if they have been pulled apart by the power of a black hole.

When Ye Tian was here, with the strength of his Eternal Ancient Rank Son of the Universe, he was a little unable to stabilize his body.

Fortunately, the power of the masters radiated over, which made Ye Tian's figure stable.

Around the black hole, there is no light, but at the level of Ye Tian, there is naturally no need for light, and he can completely rely on his divine sense to observe things.

However, here, even the Divine Consciousness of His Eternal Rank His Highness could hardly see too far away, and the entire black hole was only endless darkness and nothingness under Ye Tian's Divine Consciousness.

The black hole is very mysterious and terrifying, even the small black hole of the Milky Way, Ye Tian has never come close.

I didn't expect that the first time I got close to a black hole was in the middle of the universe, and it was such a huge black hole.

All the Highnesses were very puzzled as to why they had come here.

Could it be ......

At this time, the Xuanyuan Lord explained: "That relic world is in the depths of the black hole, and you can't get close to the depths of the black hole with your strength, this is the Supreme Order, and with the support of the Supreme Power, it is enough for you to ignore the gravitational pull of the black hole." "

Whew!!

One by one, the Supreme Orders fell into the hands of His Highnesses, and all the Highnesses immediately refined the Supreme Orders, and suddenly they couldn't feel the gravitational pull of the black hole.

Then, Ye Tian and the others were wrapped in the power of the masters and flew to the direction of the black hole.

Soon.

They were extremely close to the black hole, but the gravitational pull here did not affect Ye Tian and the others, which showed the strength of the Supreme Order.

If there was no Supreme Order, Ye Tian and the others would have been attracted by the black hole a long time ago, and then they would have been strangled into nothingness by the power of the black hole.

In an area very close to the black hole, one of the Terran masters threw out a huge altar and stood in the void.

The eight lords and the highnesses of the human race flew to the altar one after another, waiting for the opening of the world of ruins.

At this time, there were already some highnesses and powerhouses of some races nearby.

It's just that Ye Tian and the other highnesses can't see far away, and it is difficult to find the races in those distant areas.

But some races were very close to the human race, but Ye Tian's sight still found it.

I saw an area in the distance, where some dragons were entrenched, and among them was a huge golden true dragon like an eternal mountain range, its size was too big and too big.

"That's the powerhouses of the dragon clan and Your Highness!"

Other Highnesses also noticed.

The relationship between humans and dragons is very delicate, and there are some regions bordering the edge of the universe, such as the Milky Way and a galaxy of dragons.

In a very long time, the dragon clan was also one of the fierce beast races, but in the end, the dragon clan broke away from the fierce beast clan and dominated most of the fierce beast races and stood on their own.

However, the dragon race is not one of the great races of the universe, but can only be regarded as one of the higher races.

Because the number of members of the dragon clan is too small, even if almost all of the dragon clan can become strong people above the god level, but the number is scarce, it means that it is difficult to give birth to too many strong people.

For example, there are many human races, although the individual strength is weak, and there are not many humans with high talents, but relying on the huge number and the intelligence of human beings, many cosmic gods, masters, and seventy-eight top beings have been born.

However, the strong people above the dragon cosmic god are far inferior to humans, and the masters are even rarer.

However, the other cosmic clans still did not dare to underestimate the dragon clan, because the dragon clan had three supremes, known as the three ancestral dragons.

The race with the Supreme, even if there are few Supremes, the other universe races will not dare to oppress too much, otherwise if one Supreme goes crazy, it will be enough to cause unimaginable disasters to the other universe races.

Ye Tian had also been in contact with the Dragon Clan, but the Dragon Clan he was in contact with at that time was just a weak Dragon Clan in one of the weak galaxies of the Dragon Clan, not even Tianjiao, which was not worth mentioning.

Suddenly.

A team flew over, attracting the attention of many human highnesses at once.

Ye Tian also looked over, and was slightly surprised: "It's this race!"
